scriptLibrary.CASEVAC 9- Line:
LINE #1:	LOCATION (GRID)		
LINE #2:	CALL SIGN AND FREQ.		
LINE #3:	# OF PATIENTS/PRECEDENCE 		
LINE #4:	SPECIAL EQUIPMENT REQ. 		
LINE #5:	# PATIENTS/TYPE 		
LINE #6:	SECURITY AT LZ 		
LINE #7:	LZ MARKING METHOD		
LINE #8:	# NATIONALITY/STATUS		
LINE #9:	LZ TERRAIN/OBSTACLES
scriptLibrary.LSR RAPID REQUEST:
LINE A:	UNIT REQUESTING SUPPORT / CALLSIGN				
LINE B:	LOCATION OF UNIT				
LINE C:	PRIORITY (ROUTINE/URGENT/IMMEDIATE)				
LINE D:	SUPPORT REQUIRED				
LINE E:	TYPE / AMOUNT CLASS I:				
LINE F:	TYPE / AMOUNT CLASS II:				
LINE G:	TYPE / AMOUNT CLASS III:				
LINE H:	TYPE / AMOUNT CLASS IV:				
LINE I:	TYPE / AMOUNT CLASS V:				
LINE J:	TYPE / AMOUNT CLASS VIII:				
LINE K:	TYPE / AMOUNT CLASS IX:				
LINE L:	EQUIPMENT TO BE REPAIRED & PARTS NEEDED				
LINE M:	EQUIPMENT TO BE EVAC'D & REPAIR PARTS				
Line N:	ENGINEER SUPPORT NEEDED				
Line O:	MATERIAL HANDLING SUPPORT REQUIRED				
Line P:	TYPE OF CARGO TO BE MOVED				
LINE Q:	WEIGHT OF CARGO TO BE MOVED				
LINE R: 	CUBIC FEET OF CARGO TO BE MOVED				
LINE S: 	NUMBER OF PAX TO BE MOVED				
LINE T: 	DATE/TIME OF PICK-UP & LOCATION				
LINE U: 	DESTINATION OF CARGO/PAX				
LINE V:	HELO/AIR DELIVERY (YES/NO)				
LINE W: 	LZ MARKING				
LINE X: 	CONTACT INSTRUCTIONS				
LINE Y:	CLARIFYING INSTRUCTIONS				
LINE Z:	POINT OF CONTACT INFO (EMAIL/PHONE)
scriptLibrary.NBC-1:
Line A: Strike Serial Number, If Known
Line B: Position Of Observer 
Line C: Direction measured clockwise from Gird or magnetic north
Line D: Date/time attack started
Line E: Time attack ended
Line F: Location of Attack
Line G: Means of Delivery, if Known
Line H: Type of Attack
Line S: Date/Time Contamination Initially detected
Line X: Located area of contamination
